This fits B3 to B6 into the virial expansion since maxPower is set to 4.

===== Virial Coefficients in PHI0-SPACE =====
Conversion: rho = (0.75/pi) * phi0
B_n_tilde = B_n * (0.75/pi)^(n-1)
